name: Crab Rangoon (Like at the Landing - St. Louis)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh crabmeat, drained and chopped
8 oz Pkg. cream cheese at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix until smooth, reaching a pastelike consistency.
3. Place a rounded spoonful of the mixture in the center of each wrapper.
4. Bring the four corners of the wrapper together to seal the filling inside.
5. Brush the sealed wrappers with egg yolk and pinch edges to ensure they are properly sealed.
6. Deep fry at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown.
7. Serve hot with sweet and sour sauce or Chinese mustard.
8. Note: Leftovers do not keep well and should not be frozen. This recipe serves 4-6 people.
